panel.title: Configure mpvpaper
panel.buttons.folder.tooltip: Choose another folder that contains your wallpapers.
panel.buttons.refresh.tooltip: Refresh thumbnails, remove old ones and create new ones.
panel.buttons.random.tooltip: Choose a random image from this folder.
settings.toggle.label: Enable mpvpaper
settings.wallpapers_folder.title_descrip: The folder that contains all the wallpapers, useful when using random wallpaper
settings.select_wallpaper.title_descript: Choose the current video wallpaper playing.
settings.volume.label: Volume
settings.volume.description: The volume of the video wallpaper playing.
settings.mpv_socket.title_description: The mpvpaper socket that noctalia connects to.
settings.hardware_acceleration.label: Hardware Acceleration
settings.hardware_acceleration.descripti: Offloads video decoding from cpu to gpu / dedicated hardware.
settings.profile.label: Profile
settings.profile.description: The profile that mpv uses. Use fast for better performance.
settings.fill_mode.label: Fill mode
settings.fill_mode.description: The fill mode that mpvpaper uses.
settings.automation.label: Automation
settings.automation_mode.label: Change mode
settings.automation_mode.description: The mode to select the new wallpaper.
settings.automation_time.label: Time
settings.automation_time.description: How long it should take to switch the wallpaper.
settings.actions.random.tooltip: Choose a random wallpaper from the wallpapers folder.
